single.title: DINIW
single.searchString: sourcetype="usd" | table DX| head 1 | eval value=DX | append [search sourcetype="usd" enddaysago=1| fields DX | head 1 | eval value=DX]
sourcetype="usd" | table DX | head 1

sourcetype="usd" | table DX| head 1 | rename DX as DX_new | join TYPE=left [search sourcetype="usd" enddaysago=1| fields DX] | eval result= DX_new - DX | eval comp=abs(result*10000) | rangemap field=comp low=0-99 elevated=100-999 severe=1000-100000 default=low
single.option: sourcetype="usd" | table DX| head 1 | rename DX as DX_new | join TYPE=left [search sourcetype="usd" enddaysago=1| fields DX] | eval result= DX_new - DX | eval comp=abs(result*10000) | rangemap field=comp low=0-99 elevated=100-999 severe=1000-100000 default=low

sourcetype="usd" | table AUD | head 1

sourcetype="usd" | table AUD| head 1 | rename AUD as AUD_new | join TYPE=left [search sourcetype="usd" enddaysago=1| fields AUD] | eval result= AUD_new - AUD | eval comp=abs(result*10000) | rangemap field=comp low=0-99 elevated=100-999 severe=1000-100000 default=low
single.option: sourcetype="usd" | table AUD| head 1 | rename AUD as AUD_new | join TYPE=left [search sourcetype="usd" enddaysago=1| fields AUD] | eval result= AUD_new - AUD | eval comp=abs(result*10000) | rangemap field=comp low=0-99 elevated=100-999 severe=1000-100000 default=low
